name: Camp Out Chili Dogs- Slow Cooker
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound cheddar cheese, cubed or grated
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6 to 8
Combine all ingredients except cheese and rolls in rock-Pot. Stir well. Cover
and cook on Low for 5 to 10 hours or on High for 2 to 3 hours.
Add cheese just before serving and allow to melt slightly. Serve each frankfur
ter in a roll and spoon sauce over top.
